sources.label: Official repo
sources.notes: GitHub metadata checked with gh repo view.

reference_repo_influences: paper2code: classified four behavior labels and wrapper adaptation as implementation-relevant facts.
DeepPaperNote: report separates benchmark claim from MAformac C6 absorption.
MinerU-Document-Explorer: future batch index can retrieve this benchmark alongside BFCL/ACEBench.
paper-qa: contested metric claims should use source-grounded QA before proposal.
MinerU: PDF/OCR fallback retained if full paper section locators are needed.
docling-mcp: conversion/cache model remains available for future structured source extraction.
algorithm_traits: Tool hallucination metric for no-tool cannot-answer cases

maformac_insertion_points.recommendation: Map direct/tool_call/request_for_info/cannot_answer to explicit C6 buckets and failure classes.
Future cases should cover missing required parameter, no available tool, and irrelevant tool distractors.
Track negative/clarify/refusal ratios separately from positive tool exact-match.
Do not smuggle preference optimization into the current SFT loop.

openspec_candidates: Future C6 requirement: evaluation SHALL report no-call/refusal/clarify/tool-call separately.
Future C5 design note: preference data is an escape hatch, not current SFT training scope.

gate.rationale: Directly improves C6 negative/clarification/refusal taxonomy and guards against tool hallucination.
stop_conditions: No direct import of upstream wrappers.
Do not collapse clarification and refusal into one negative class.

residual_risks: Repo is not highly starred and was last pushed in 2025.
Full paper numeric claims were not page-locator extracted.
Preference optimization requires separate training proposal.
